currentPassword.description: CurrentPassword is the user's current password.

newPassword.description: NewPassword is the user's desired new password.

callerEmail.description: CallerEmail is the email address of the person booking.

callerName.description: CallerName is the full name of the person booking.

callerPhone.description: CallerPhone is the phone number of the person booking.

durationMins.description: DurationMins is the appointment duration in minutes.

scheduledAt.description: ScheduledAt is the requested appointment time in RFC3339 format.

serviceType.description: ServiceType is the type of IT service requested.

scheduledAt.description: ScheduledAt is the new appointment time in RFC3339 format.

query.description: Query is the natural language search query.

topK.description: TopK is the number of results to return.

email.description: Email is the user's email address.
Email is the user's email address.

password.description: Password is the user's chosen password.

notes.description: Notes contains additional notes about the lead.

status.description: Status is the new lead status (new, contacted, qualified, converted, lost).

email.description: Email is the user's new email address.

defaultLlmProvider.description: DefaultLLMProvider is the name of the default LLM provider.

defaultVoiceId.description: DefaultVoiceID is the default ElevenLabs voice identifier.

maxCallDurationSecs.description: MaxCallDurationSecs is the maximum call duration in seconds.

topK.description: TopK is the number of top results in vector search.

callId.description: CallID is the related call identifier.

callerEmail.description: CallerEmail is the email address of the person who booked.

callerName.description: CallerName is the full name of the person who booked.

callerPhone.description: CallerPhone is the phone number of the person who booked.

createdAt.description: CreatedAt is the creation timestamp in RFC3339 format.

durationMins.description: DurationMins is the appointment duration in minutes.

googleEventId.description: GoogleEventID is the Google Calendar event identifier.

id.description: ID is the appointment's unique identifier.

scheduledAt.description: ScheduledAt is the appointment date and time in RFC3339 format.

serviceType.description: ServiceType is the type of IT service requested.

smsSentAt.description: SMSSentAt is the SMS confirmation timestamp in RFC3339 format.

status.description: Status is the current appointment status.

updatedAt.description: UpdatedAt is the last modification timestamp in RFC3339 format.

token.description: Token is the JWT authentication token.

user.description: User is the authenticated user's profile.

callerPhone.description: CallerPhone is the caller's phone number.

createdAt.description: CreatedAt is the call start timestamp in RFC3339 format.

durationSeconds.description: DurationSeconds is the call duration in seconds.

endedAt.description: EndedAt is the call end timestamp in RFC3339 format.

id.description: ID is the call's unique identifier.

llmCostUsd.description: LLMCostUSD is the LLM cost in US dollars.

ragQueries.description: RAGQueries is the RAG queries executed during the call.

status.description: Status is the current call status.

totalCostUsd.description: TotalCostUSD is the total cost in US dollars.

transcript.description: Transcript is the call transcript entries.

twilioCallSid.description: TwilioCallSID is the Twilio-assigned call session identifier.

twilioCostUsd.description: TwilioCostUSD is the Twilio cost in US dollars.

days.description: Days is the daily call volume.

totalCalls.description: TotalCalls is the total number of calls in the period.

days.description: Days is the daily cost breakdown.

totalCost.description: TotalCost is the combined total cost in the period.

totalLlmCost.description: TotalLLMCost is the total LLM cost in the period.

totalTwilioCost.description: TotalTwilioCost is the total Twilio cost in the period.

avgCostPerCall.description: AvgCostPerCall is the average total cost per call in US dollars.

callsToday.description: CallsToday is the number of calls received today.

totalAppointments.description: TotalAppointments is the total number of appointments booked.

totalCalls.description: TotalCalls is the total number of inbound calls.

totalCostUsd.description: TotalCostUSD is the total cost across all calls in US dollars.

totalLeads.description: TotalLeads is the total number of leads captured.

callCount.description: CallCount is the number of calls on this day.

date.description: Date is the day in YYYY-MM-DD format.

llmCost.description: LLMCost is the LLM cost for this day.

totalCost.description: TotalCost is the total cost for this day.

twilioCost.description: TwilioCost is the Twilio cost for this day.

avgDuration.description: AvgDuration is the average call duration in seconds.

callCount.description: CallCount is the number of calls on this day.

date.description: Date is the day in YYYY-MM-DD format.

chunkCount.description: ChunkCount is the number of chunks the document was split into.

createdAt.description: CreatedAt is the creation timestamp in RFC3339 format.

filename.description: Filename is the original file name.

id.description: ID is the document's unique identifier.

indexedAt.description: IndexedAt is the indexing completion timestamp in RFC3339 format.

mimeType.description: MimeType is the file MIME type.

status.description: Status is the current indexing status.

updatedAt.description: UpdatedAt is the last modification timestamp in RFC3339 format.

answer.description: Answer is the LLM-generated answer from the retrieved context.

provider.description: Provider is the LLM provider that generated the answer.

sources.description: Sources is the list of source chunks used to generate the answer.

tokens.description: Tokens is the number of tokens consumed.

callId.description: CallID is the related call identifier.

createdAt.description: CreatedAt is the creation timestamp in RFC3339 format.

email.description: Email is the lead's email address.

id.description: ID is the lead's unique identifier.

name.description: Name is the lead's full name.

notes.description: Notes contains additional notes about the lead.

phone.description: Phone is the lead's phone number.

status.description: Status is the current lead status.

updatedAt.description: UpdatedAt is the last modification timestamp in RFC3339 format.

items.description: Items contains the page of results.

page.description: Page is the current page number (1-based).

pageSize.description: PageSize is the number of items per page.

total.description: Total is the total number of matching items across all pages.

at.description: At is the query timestamp in RFC3339 format.

chunks.description: Chunks is the list of retrieved chunk IDs.

provider.description: Provider is the LLM provider used.

tokens.description: Tokens is the number of tokens consumed.

chunkId.description: ChunkID is the matched chunk's identifier.

content.description: Content is the matched text content.

documentId.description: DocumentID is the source document's identifier.

pageNumber.description: PageNumber is the source page number.

defaultLlmProvider.description: DefaultLLMProvider is the name of the default LLM provider.

defaultVoiceId.description: DefaultVoiceID is the default ElevenLabs voice identifier.

maxCallDurationSecs.description: MaxCallDurationSecs is the maximum call duration in seconds.

topK.description: TopK is the number of top results in vector search.

updatedAt.description: UpdatedAt is the last modification timestamp in RFC3339 format.

end.description: End is the end of the time slot in RFC3339 format.

start.description: Start is the beginning of the time slot in RFC3339 format.

at.description: At is the speech timestamp in RFC3339 format.

speaker.description: Speaker identifies who spoke (caller or assistant).

createdAt.description: CreatedAt is the account creation timestamp in RFC3339 format.

email.description: Email is the user's email address.

id.description: ID is the user's unique identifier.

isBlocked.description: IsBlocked indicates whether the user account is blocked.

role.description: Role is the user's permission role.

updatedAt.description: UpdatedAt is the last modification timestamp in RFC3339 format.
